name: elevana
description: Elevana e-learning platform — root launcher for all microservices + frontend

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n auth,chat,course,search,web -c blue,magenta,green,yellow,cyan "cd backend/auth-services && npm run dev" "cd backend/chat-service && npm run dev" "cd backend/course-service && npm run dev" "cd backend/search-service && npm run dev" "cd frontend/my-app && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently -k -n auth,chat,course,search -c blue,magenta,green,yellow "cd backend/auth-services && npm run dev" "cd backend/chat-service && npm run dev" "cd backend/course-service && npm run dev" "cd backend/search-service && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend/auth-services install && npm --prefix backend/chat-service install && npm --prefix backend/course-service install && npm --prefix backend/search-service install && npm --prefix frontend/my-app install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run seed
